title: Fiery Syrian Dumplings
description: A spicy twist on traditional dumplings, filled with creamy cheese and crispy onions. Serve with a side of fiery sauce for an added kick.

ingredients.name: dough
ingredients.notes: use gluten-free flour for gluten-free option

ingredients.name: fiery cheese
ingredients.notes: spicy cheese or pepper jack work well

ingredients.name: cream
ingredients.notes: for cream cheese or cheese sauce

ingredients.name: fiery sauce
ingredients.notes: hot sauce or sriracha work well

instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C)
Make the dough by mixing flour, water, and salt. Knead for 5-7 minutes.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch (6 mm)
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a spoonful of crispy onions and fiery cheese in the center of each circle.
Brush the edges with cream and fold the dough in half to form a triangle or a square.
Seal the edges by pressing with a fork or your fingers.
Heat 2-3 inches (5-7.5 cm) of oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C)
Fry the dumplings in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Drain the dumplings on paper towels and serve hot with fiery sauce
